global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with prominent text elements and decorative shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale on travel bookings.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: DriftPass SALE
elements.description: Bold, large text reading 'DriftPass SALE' in a contrasting color, positioned prominently at the top.

elements.label: Book your next trip
elements.description: Medium-sized text stating 'Book your next trip' in a clear, readable font, centered below the headline.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller text that reads 'Flexible booking options', providing additional information below the main message.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Learn more', designed to stand out and encourage user interaction.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Several circular shapes in varying sizes, adding a decorative touch to the background.

elements.label: Rectangular shapes
elements.description: A few rectangular shapes scattered across the background, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: Additional circles
elements.description: More circular elements that complement the existing shapes, creating a dynamic layout.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Small circular shapes positioned strategically to add depth to the design.

elements.label: Medium rectangles
elements.description: Medium-sized rectangles that contribute to the overall composition without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Additional rectangles
elements.description: More rectangles that enhance the layout, maintaining a cohesive design.

elements.label: Small rectangles
elements.description: Small rectangles that add subtle detail to the background.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangle that serves as a backdrop for the text elements.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: A medium rectangle that adds structure to the design.

elements.label: Vertical rectangle
elements.description: A vertical rectangle that provides balance to the overall composition.

elements.label: Small vertical shape
elements.description: A small vertical shape that adds a unique element to the design.

elements.label: Thin vertical line
elements.description: A thin vertical line that adds detail without overwhelming the design.

elements.label: Top decorative line
elements.description: A decorative line at the top of the ad, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: A medium rectangle that adds to the layered effect of the design.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle that contributes to the overall aesthetic.

elements.label: Top small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle positioned at the top, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Tiny vertical line
elements.description: A tiny vertical line that adds subtle detail to the design.

elements.label: Top right rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle in the top right corner, enhancing the layout.

elements.label: Bottom left line
elements.description: A small line at the bottom left, adding a unique touch.

elements.label: Bottom right rectangle
elements.description: A rectangle in the bottom right corner that balances the composition.

elements.label: Bottom right shapes
elements.description: Shapes in the bottom right that enhance the overall design.

elements.label: Bottom left shapes
elements.description: Shapes in the bottom left that add depth to the layout.

elements.label: Small left shapes
elements.description: Small shapes on the left side that contribute to the design.

elements.label: Left vertical line
elements.description: A vertical line on the left side that adds structure.

elements.label: Top left rectangle
elements.description: A rectangle in the top left corner that enhances the layout.

elements.label: Top left small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle in the top left that adds detail.

elements.label: Top left tiny line
elements.description: A tiny line in the top left corner that adds subtlety.

elements.label: Main call to action
elements.description: A prominent call to action at the bottom, encouraging users to engage with the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexinla ions Learn more

elements.label: SALE announcement
elements.description: A bold announcement of a sale, designed to grab attention immediately.
